mapper.select:
SELECT T.* FROM T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N T
ORDER BY
T.ID DESC

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT M.* ,C.LOCALENAME FROM T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N M, T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H, T_CORE_I18N_CONFIG C,T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE H.ID = M.MODULEPAGEHISTORYID AND H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND M.I18NCONFIGID = C.ID AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes' ) T
ORDER BY
T.ID DESC

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT I.ID, I.CODE , I.DESCRIPTION , I.DEFAULTMESSAGE , 0 MODULEPAGEHISTORYID , GROUP_CONCAT(H.PATH,',') PATH FROM (SELECT I18N.ID, I18N.CODE , I18N.DESCRIPTION , I18N.DEFAULTMESSAGE FROM T_CORE_I18N I18N LEFT JOIN T_CORE_I18N_MESSAGE I18NM ON I18N.ID = I18NM.I18NID
AND I18NM.I18NCONFIGID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{localeId}, '%')
AND I18NM.MESSAGE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{message}, '%')
AND I18N.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')
AND I18N.CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
GROUP BY I18N.ID,I18N.CODE,I18N.DESCRIPTION,I18N.DEFAULTMESSAGE) I LEFT JOIN T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE I18NC ON I.CODE = I18NC.CODE LEFT JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H ON H.ID = I18NC.MODULEPAGEHISTORYID LEFT JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE R on H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND ((H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK L WHERE L.RESOURCEID = CAST(H.RESOURCEID AS CHAR) AND L.LOCKUSERID = #{loginUser.id})) OR (H.EFFECTFLAG = 'no' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK L WHERE L.RESOURCEID = CAST(H.RESOURCEID AS CHAR) AND L.LOCKUSERID = #{loginUser.id})))
AND H.PATH LIKE '%' || #{path} || '%'
GROUP BY I.ID,I.CODE,I.DESCRIPTION,I.DEFAULTMESSAGE UNION ALL SELECT 0 ID , I18NM.CODE , NULL DESCRIPTION , NULL DEFAULTMESSAGE , I18NM.MODULEPAGEHISTORYID, H.PATH FROM T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N I18NM LEFT JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H ON H.ID = I18NM.MODULEPAGEHISTORYID JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE R on H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0' WHERE ((H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK L WHERE L.RESOURCEID = CAST(H.RESOURCEID AS CHAR) AND L.LOCKUSERID = #{loginUser.id})) OR (H.EFFECTFLAG = 'no' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK L WHERE L.RESOURCEID = CAST(H.RESOURCEID AS CHAR) AND L.LOCKUSERID = #{loginUser.id})))
AND I18NM.I18NCONFIGID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{localeId}, '%')
AND I18NM.MESSAGE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{message}, '%')
AND 1 = 2
AND I18NM.CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND H.PATH LIKE '%' || #{path} || '%'
GROUP BY I18NM.MODULEPAGEHISTORYID,I18NM.CODE,H.PATH ) T ORDER BY T.CODE
